info.description:
Merchant-facing wallets/address-as-a-service API for creating merchant receive addresses, inspecting balances, quoting transfers, and initiating payouts to whitelisted recipients.
Public endpoints are for external integrators. Dashboard endpoints are gateway-to-environment surfaces protected by the external API gateway. Internal endpoints are platform/system surfaces protected by an internal token.
info.title: Yara External API - Public API

get.description: Lists merchant deposit addresses with optional chain and status filters.

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a receive address for a supported chain. The returned address ID is the stable identifier integrators should store.

get.description: Returns a single deposit address owned by the authenticated merchant.
Returns the merchant's USD available and reserved balances from Formance. Pending deposits are unconfirmed deposit records and are not spendable ledger balance.
Returns chains and asset rails currently understood by the external API.
Lists merchant deposit records. Sweeps are intentionally excluded.

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns a single deposit owned by the authenticated merchant.
Returns the active merchant fee schedule.
Returns current USD conversion rates and expiry information.
Lists deposit and transfer projections for the merchant. Sweeps are not included in this feed.

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates an async transfer intent from a valid quote and queues processing.
Quotes a transfer to an already whitelisted recipient.

get.description: Returns a single merchant transfer intent.
Lists outbound webhook events and delivery status history for the authenticated merchant.

parameters.description: Number of results per page (default: 50, max: 200)
parameters.name: limit

ApiKeyAuth.description: Public merchant API key. You can also send Authorization: ApiKey <key>.
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
